calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-29-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Austin Nagel, Esq. for Plaintiff: Citicapital Technology finance, Inc., fka EAB Leasing Corp., by and through its fidelity Leasing Division, a corp.
Order waiving live testimony granted in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Katie Carter in file, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Phase Two Strategies, Inc., a corporation as follows:
Principal total $216,477.04
Prejudgment Interest total $30,840.57
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $342.08, for a total of $250,484.69
Judgment signed in open court.
